task_description: Build a complete Rental Property Management PWA (SaaS, multi-tenant) for the Vietnamese market. Backend: FastAPI + Supabase. Frontend: React 18 + Vite + TypeScript + TailwindCSS. Covers all 26 tasks from the execution plan across 10 phases: project setup, auth, property management, contracts/renters, staff/tasks, finance/invoicing, meter readings with AI OCR, maintenance, notifications/cron, reports/analytics, and deployment.

verification.summary: Backend: all 12 routers import successfully, all services/middleware/utilities import cleanly. Frontend: TypeScript compilation + Vite build passes (1337 modules, PWA precache 6 entries). All migration files exist. Deployment configs (Vercel, Railway) created.
